characters.name: Sky.ix
characters.description: A 45-year-old Caucasian cyborg woman with short white hair. Her face and body have visible cybernetic enhancements that allow her to traverse the Void.

characters.name: Kai
characters.description: Sky.ix's child, lost and now found. Holds the key to the Prophecy.

characters.name: Delilah
characters.description: A corrupted form of Ingris, wielding Voidfire.
